purpose.task: General-purpose conversational AI assistant for text generation, analysis, coding, image understanding, image generation, web browsing, data analysis, and agentic task completion.
purpose.intendedUse: Personal productivity, research, education, creative writing, software development, and enterprise workflows. Available via consumer chat interface (chatgpt.com) and developer API.
purpose.outOfScopeUse: Providing definitive medical, financial, or legal advice. Autonomous weapons systems. Generation of content violating OpenAI's Usage Policies, including CSAM, targeted harassment, or deceptive impersonation.

architecture.baseModel: Proprietary large language model family developed by OpenAI. Current models include GPT-5.3 Instant (default conversational), GPT-5.4 Thinking (advanced reasoning), GPT-5.4 Pro (maximum capability), and GPT-5.3-Codex (agentic coding). Auto mode dynamically routes between models. Parameter counts not disclosed.
architecture.planningModule: GPT-5.4 Thinking provides adaptive reasoning with configurable thinking time (Light, Standard, Extended). Shows upfront thinking plans for complex tasks. GPT-5.3-Codex provides agentic coding with autonomous multi-step execution.
architecture.memorySystem: Short-term: Conversational context window up to 400K tokens (GPT-5.3 Instant). Long-term: Optional Memory feature persists user preferences and facts across conversations when enabled by the user.

knowledgeSystem.type: Parametric knowledge from training data, augmented by real-time web browsing, code execution, and tool use.
knowledgeSystem.source: Training data from publicly available internet text, licensed datasets, and other sources. Knowledge cutoff varies by model version. Web browsing tool provides real-time information access.

tools.description: Can browse the web in real-time to retrieve current information and cite sources.
Can write and execute Python code in a sandboxed environment for data analysis and computation.
Can generate images via integrated DALL-E model based on text descriptions.
Can read and analyze up to 20 uploaded files per message including PDFs, spreadsheets, images, and code.
Can interpret and analyze images (multimodal vision capability).
GPT-5.4 introduces computer use capabilities for agentic interaction with software environments.

apiAccess.description: RESTful API supporting streaming, function calling, vision, structured outputs, and batch processing.

benchmarks.name: GDPval (Professional Knowledge Work)
benchmarks.notes: Measures well-specified knowledge work tasks across 44 occupations. GPT-5.2 Thinking beats or ties top industry professionals on 70.9% of comparisons.

benchmarks.name: HealthBench
benchmarks.notes: Realistic health scenario evaluation based on physician-defined criteria.

benchmarks.name: SWE-bench Verified (Coding)
benchmarks.notes: Agentic coding benchmark. GPT-5.3-Codex and GPT-5.4 show strong performance.

benchmarks.name: MMLU (GPT-4o baseline)
benchmarks.notes: Legacy benchmark for GPT-4o. Newer GPT-5 family benchmarks focus on professional tasks.

limitations: May hallucinate plausible-sounding but incorrect facts, citations, or code.
Knowledge cutoff means information may be outdated without web browsing enabled.
Web browsing results depend on availability and accuracy of indexed web content.
Auto mode routing between models is opaque; users may not know which model is responding.
Long-term Memory feature may retain information users did not intend to persist; users must manage memory manually.
Rapid model versioning (GPT-5.0 through 5.4 in 8 months) means documentation can lag behind current capabilities.

_auditMetadata.methodology: Manual audit using OpenAI's official documentation including model announcements, system cards, API documentation (platform.openai.com), release notes, help center articles, and published research.

difficultyNotes.architecture: Difficult — rapid versioning makes documentation a moving target. Parameter counts not disclosed. Internal routing logic opaque.
difficultyNotes.capabilities: Easy — tools visible in UI and documented in API docs.
difficultyNotes.communication: Moderate — audio I/O details required checking multiple sources.
difficultyNotes.evaluation: Moderate — benchmarks scattered across multiple announcements and model versions. Newer GPT-5 family uses different benchmarks than GPT-4o era.
